title: Luxury Estates App
metaTitle: Luxury Estates App Case Study | Neon
description: An immersive real-estate browsing application implementing interactive map overlays, dynamic search filters, and custom smooth micro-interactions.
overview: Luxury Estates sought to redefine the mobile property searching experience. They wanted an interface that felt less like a directory list and more like an immersive luxury editorial magazine, combined with powerful map searches.

We created a custom gesture-driven mobile layout that relies on hardware-accelerated transforms to slide between lists, details, and high-definition photo galleries. Map clustering algorithms were optimized for lag-free exploration.

sections.title: Spatial Map Clustering
sections.description: We customized a spatial cluster indexer to handle over 10,000 active properties. By utilizing regional spatial querying, map pins are dynamically grouped and computed instantly on user panning.

sections.title: Fluid Gesture System
sections.description: Utilizing gesture handlers and spring physics, card expansion and swiping motions are calculated dynamically, providing organic visual feedback that matches natural touch speed.

features.title: Map-based Search
features.description: Seamless map-driven navigation with high performance custom pin styling and radius calculations.

features.title: High Resolution Galleries
features.description: Optimized image grids supporting immersive double-tap zoom gestures and swipe-to-dismiss galleries.

features.title: Smart Filters
features.description: Highly granular filtering parameters for price range, structural features, and geographic proximity.

results.description: Following the App Store release, Luxury Estates received positive reviews and an immediate increase in organic lead generation.
